---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for the GIS Dashboard project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. What functionality should be added?

## 🎯 Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What is the use case? Why is this feature needed?

**User Story** (if applicable):
> As a [type of user], I want [goal] so that [benefit].

## 💭 Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working. Include:
- User interface changes (if any)
- User workflow
- Technical approach (if you have ideas)
- Integration with existing features

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered. Why is the proposed solution better?

## 📐 Mockups/Examples

If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, screenshots, or examples to illustrate your idea.

## 🎨 Design Considerations

- [ ] Requires UI/UX design
- [ ] Requires API changes
- [ ] Requires database changes
- [ ] Requires new dependencies
- [ ] Breaking change (requires migration)

## 📊 Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Low - Nice to have, but not critical
- [ ] Medium - Would be useful, but can wait
- [ ] High - Important for my use case
- [ ] Critical - Blocking my work or usage

## 🔗 Related Issues

Link to any related issues, discussions, or pull requests.

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this hasn't been requested before
- [ ] I have provided all the information requested above
- [ ] I am willing to contribute to the implementation (if applicable)
